description_long: This is a small, lifelike bird with a streamlined body and a subtle color gradient from light grayish-brown on the head and underparts to a slightly darker brown on the wings and tail. The bird has a short, conical beak that is well-suited for seed eating, and its eyes are positioned laterally on the head. The wings are folded tightly against the body, and the tail is straight and moderately long, tapering to a slightly rounded tip. The legs are short and mostly hidden beneath the body, with a pale, grayish coloration. The plumage is smooth and uniform, lacking any prominent spots or stripes, giving the bird a sleek and understated appearance.
description: A small, smooth-feathered bird with a grayish-brown gradient, short conical beak, and a straight, slightly rounded tail. Its plumage is uniform and understated, with subtle color transitions.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's full body profile, smooth gradient from head to tail, and the conical beak.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the straight tail and the symmetry of the folded wings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the other lateral profile and the smooth feathering.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the beak, rounded head, and the subtle transition of color on the chest.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid with subtle gradient from grayish head to brown wings and tail
